mapper.select:
/* DR 수익 조회 */ select site_id, std_yearm, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d') as reduct_sdate, count(*) as reduct_cnt_hour, /* 감축 횟수-시간(회-hr) */ sum(reduct_cap) as reduct_cap, /* 감축이행용량 */ sum(reduct_amt) as reduct_amt, /* 감축인정용량 */ avg(reduct_cap_per) as reduct_cap_per, sum(cap_amt) as cap_amt, sum(reduct_reward_amt) as reduct_reward_amt, sum(total_reward_amt) as total_reward_amt, sum(csm_reward_amt) as csm_reward_amt, sum(ewp_reward_amt) as ewp_reward_amt, avg(dr_profit_ratio) as profit_ratio /* 수익비율(%) : 필수 중개인-고객 계약시 정해짐 (FIX) */ from ( select b.*, ( total_reward_amt*dr_profit_ratio ) as csm_reward_amt, /* 고객정산금액 : KPX에서 동서발전에 100% 지급. 동서발전(or 인코어드 같은 중개업체)에서 수수료 제외하고 나머지 고객에게 지급(실적총정산금액*수익비율(0~1)) */ total_reward_amt-( total_reward_amt*dr_profit_ratio ) as ewp_reward_amt /* ewp 정산금액(실적총정산금액-고객정산금액) */ from ( select c.*, ( reduct_amt*reduce_hour*smp ) as reduct_reward_amt, /* 감축정산금 = 감축인정용량 * 시간(감축시간*1) * 실적정산금(or 실적요금. 90원/kwh)(실적정산금=smp) */ cap_amt+( reduct_amt*reduce_hour*smp ) as total_reward_amt /* 실적총정산금액 = 용량정산금 + 감축정산금 */ from ( select dr_revn_idx, d.site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, dr_profit_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, cast(date_format(TIMEDIFF(reduct_etimestamp, reduct_stimestamp),'%H') as unsigned INTEGER) as reduce_hour, ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 as reduct_cap_per, /* 감축이행율 = (감축인정용량/감축이행용량) * 100 */ ( reduct_amt*reduct_cap ) as cap_amt /* 용량정산금 = (감축인정용량 * 기본용량요금) */ from tb_dr_revenue d, tb_site_set e where d.site_id = e.site_id and d.site_id = #{siteId } and std_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } ) c ) b ) a group by site_id, std_yearm
, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d')

/* DR 수익 명세서 조회 */ select site_id, std_yearm, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d') as reduct_sdate, count(*) as reduct_cnt_hour, /* 감축 횟수-시간(회-hr) */ sum(reduct_cap) as reduct_cap, /* 감축이행용량 */ sum(reduct_amt) as reduct_amt, /* 감축인정용량 */ avg(reduct_cap_per) as reduct_cap_per, sum(cap_amt) as cap_amt, sum(reduct_reward_amt) as reduct_reward_amt, sum(total_reward_amt) as total_reward_amt, sum(csm_reward_amt) as csm_reward_amt, sum(ewp_reward_amt) as ewp_reward_amt, avg(dr_profit_ratio) as profit_ratio /* 수익비율(%) : 필수 중개인-고객 계약시 정해짐 (FIX) */ from ( SELECT dr_revn_idx, d.site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, dr_profit_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 as reduct_cap_per, /* 감축이행율 = (감축인정용량/감축이행용량) * 100 */ ( reduct_amt*reduct_cap ) as cap_amt, /* 용량정산금 = (감축인정용량 * 기본용량요금) */ 123 as reduct_reward_amt, /* 감축정산금 = 감축인정용량 * 시간 * 실적정산금(or 실적요금. 90원/kwh)(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ ( ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 )+(123) as total_reward_amt, /* 실적총정산금액 = 용량정산금 + 감축정산금 */ 567 as csm_reward_amt, /* 고객정산금액 : KPX에서 동서발전에 100% 지급. 동서발전(or 인코어드 같은 중개업체)에서 수수료 제외하고 나머지 고객에게 지급(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ 33 as ewp_reward_amt /* ewp 정산금액(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ FROM tb_dr_revenue d, tb_site_set e where d.site_id = e.site_id and d.site_id = #{siteId } and std_yearm = #{selTermTex } ) a group by site_id, std_yearm
, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d')

/* DR 수익 명세서 그래프 조회 */ select site_id, std_yearm, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d') as reduct_sdate, count(*) as reduct_cnt_hour, /* 감축 횟수-시간(회-hr) */ sum(reduct_cap) as reduct_cap, /* 감축이행용량 */ sum(reduct_amt) as reduct_amt, /* 감축인정용량 */ avg(reduct_cap_per) as reduct_cap_per, sum(cap_amt) as cap_amt, sum(reduct_reward_amt) as reduct_reward_amt, sum(total_reward_amt) as total_reward_amt, sum(csm_reward_amt) as csm_reward_amt, sum(ewp_reward_amt) as ewp_reward_amt, avg(dr_profit_ratio) as profit_ratio /* 수익비율(%) : 필수 중개인-고객 계약시 정해짐 (FIX) */ from ( select b.*, ( total_reward_amt*dr_profit_ratio ) as csm_reward_amt, /* 고객정산금액 : KPX에서 동서발전에 100% 지급. 동서발전(or 인코어드 같은 중개업체)에서 수수료 제외하고 나머지 고객에게 지급(실적총정산금액*수익비율(0~1)) */ total_reward_amt-( total_reward_amt*dr_profit_ratio ) as ewp_reward_amt /* ewp 정산금액(실적총정산금액-고객정산금액) */ from ( select c.*, ( reduct_amt*reduce_hour*smp ) as reduct_reward_amt, /* 감축정산금 = 감축인정용량 * 시간(감축시간*1) * 실적정산금(or 실적요금. 90원/kwh)(실적정산금=smp) */ cap_amt+( reduct_amt*reduce_hour*smp ) as total_reward_amt /* 실적총정산금액 = 용량정산금 + 감축정산금 */ from ( select dr_revn_idx, d.site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, dr_profit_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, cast(date_format(TIMEDIFF(reduct_etimestamp, reduct_stimestamp),'%H') as unsigned INTEGER) as reduce_hour, ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 as reduct_cap_per, /* 감축이행율 = (감축인정용량/감축이행용량) * 100 */ ( reduct_amt*reduct_cap ) as cap_amt /* 용량정산금 = (감축인정용량 * 기본용량요금) */ from tb_dr_revenue d, tb_site_set e where d.site_id = e.site_id and d.site_id = #{siteId } and std_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } ) c ) b ) a group by site_id, std_yearm
, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d')
